title: Thumbprint Design System from Thumbtack
content: Thumbprint from Directories: Components: Thumbprint Design System by Thumbtack is a comprehensive framework aimed at fostering high-quality, consistent user experiences across its products. System includes guidelines for accessibility, a variety of components, and a set of design tokens. Thumbprint is a dynamic system that simplifies the design and development workflow by unifying, standardizing, and thoroughly documenting processes. Accessibility Color System Component overview Component status Repository Icons Motion Responsive Spacing Tokens Typography Voice and Tone Alert banner Avatar Button Button group Checkbox Chip Date picker Dropdown Help text Label Link List Modal Navigation bar Popover Progress indicator Radio button Snackbar Switch Tag Text area Text field Tooltip
